b:T2e0a,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. cell wall</p>
<p><em>Must be shown as a double line</em></p>
<p>b. large vacuole</p>
<p><em>Labelled either inside or on the membrane</em></p>
<p>c. chloroplast/plastid</p>
<p>d. starch grain</p>
<p>e. tonoplast</p>
<p><em>Allow <strong>[2 max]</strong> if any features common to both plant cells and animal cells are labelled</em></p>
<p><img height="216" src="data:image/png;base64," width="316"/></p>
<p><em><strong>[Max 3 Marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. autotrophs perform photosynthesis</p>
<p>b. carbon dioxide and water are the reactants/raw materials required for «photosynthesis»</p>
<p>c. light splits water molecules/causes photolysis</p>
<p>d. «photolysis» releases oxygen as a «waste» product</p>
<p>e. light energy is converted into chemical energy</p>
<p>f. «photosynthesis» produces organic compounds/glucose/carbohydrates</p>
<p>g. photosynthesis occurs in chloroplasts</p>
<p>h. chlorophyll «photosynthetic pigment» absorbs light</p>
<p>i. different pigments absorb different wavelengths «of light»</p>
<p>j. chlorophyll absorbs red and blue light/ends of the spectrum</p>
<p>k. carbon dioxide concentration/temperature/light intensity are limiting factors</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Award only <strong>[1]</strong> for correct display of equation unless further annotated or explained</em></p>
<p><em>Allow up to <strong>[2]</strong> for correct use of understandings specified as AHL topic 8</em></p>
<p><strong><em>[Max 8 Marks]</em></strong></p>
<p> </p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. formed from dead plant material/leaves/mosses/Sphagnum</p>
<p>b. formed in waterlogged sites/bogs/mires/swamps</p>
<p>c. where bacteria/fungi/saprotrophs are not active/are inhibited</p>
<p>d. organic matter not fully decomposed</p>
<p>e. «occurs» in acidic conditions</p>
<p>f. «occurs» in anaerobic conditions</p>
<p><em>Reject anaerobic respiration</em></p>
<p>g. «very» slow process/takes a long time</p>
<p><em><strong>[Max 4 Marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"17N.2.SL.TZ0.07"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"17N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-9-photosynthesis, 4-3-carbon-cycling"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"specification\">\n<p>Plants have widespread influences, from food chains to climate change.</p>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Draw a diagram of a palisade mesophyll cell labelling only the structures that would not be present in a pancreatic cell.</p>\n<p> </p>\n<p> </p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[3]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Explain the process of photosynthesis.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[8]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Describe the process of peat formation.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[4]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],""]}]
